What you can count on

Service you don't have to think about.

We'd rather show you what we stand for than say it. Here's what every Modra client gets, every time.

  • ✓
    We show up when we say we willScheduled, confirmed, and on time — your property is handled without you chasing us.
  • ✓
    Clear, flat quotesYou'll know the price before we start. No surprises on the invoice.
  • ✓
    Licensed pros for specialized workAnything that needs a licensed trade is done by one — never improvised.
  • ✓
    One owner-led teamThe people who own the company answer for the work. You always know who's accountable.
  • ✓
    We treat your home like our ownCareful, respectful, thorough — because our reputation rides on every visit.

Veteran-owned and operated.

Modra Property Services is led by Kyle, a U.S. veteran, and it shows in how we work: clear communication, accountability, and follow-through on every commitment. When we say we'll handle it, we handle it.

Buy a Modra home, move in cared for.

Every home Modra sells is made show-ready by Modra Property Services before it reaches the market — and every buyer moves in with a complimentary month of Essential Care included. Your new home keeps looking its best from day one, on us.

1 month of Essential Care · included
Beyond upkeep

Repairs and projects, handled right.

Need more than routine care? We take on handyman work and larger projects too. When a job calls for a permit or a licensed trade, Modra pulls the proper permits through our licensed builder and brings in a network of licensed, insured professionals — so it's done to code, and always to the Modra standard.

  • ✓
    Handyman & small repairsDoors, fixtures, mounting, patching, and the small fixes that keep a home right.
  • ✓
    Permits, pulled properlyThrough Modra's licensed Michigan builder, we pull the permits a job requires.
  • ✓
    A vetted pro networkLicensed, insured trades for anything specialized — coordinated and overseen by us.
  • ✓
    Always to the Modra standardOne accountable team, whether it's a quick fix or a full project.

STEP 02

Modra gives back

Good to know

Common questions.

How does billing work?

Care plans are billed monthly and you can cancel anytime. À-la-carte services are billed when delivered. We'll send a clear quote before any work begins.

Which areas do you serve?

We work across West Michigan. Reach out with your address and we'll confirm we can take great care of you.

What do you handle — and what don't you?

We handle property care: cleaning, exterior upkeep, curb appeal, seasonal and turnover work. For specialized or licensed trade work, we coordinate trusted, licensed professionals so it's done right.

What makes Modra different?

We're veteran-owned, and we're part of a group that also renovates and funds real estate — so the same accountable team can take your home from upkeep to rebuild.

Modra Capital

How the group is funded.

Full transparency on how Modra funds its work — our own capital covers purchase and renovation, with a network of trusted investors and licensed partners ready when a project needs more.

Our funding approach

Everything funded, under one roof.

Modra keeps the whole project under one roof. We can fully fund both the purchase and the renovation in-house — no outside money needed to get a home done — and we keep a network of trusted investors ready for when a project calls for expansion or additional capital. On the Bristol House, Modra covered the purchase and renovation directly, then sourced secured funding to carry it across the finish line. Every dollar is matched to the right stage, with conservative underwriting before anything moves.

From dollars to doors

How capital moves through Modra.

SOURCES

Commit & secure

We commit our own capital and secure any financing through licensed partners.

→
DEPLOY

Acquire & rebuild

Properties acquires and renovates against a clear, conservative budget.

→
RETURN

Sell or hold

The finished home is sold or held, and proceeds fund the next project.

The Modra Capital difference

Disciplined, transparent, accountable.

We treat capital the way we'd want our own treated — conservatively, transparently, and with a long-term view. Questions about how a project is funded? We're happy to walk you through it.

Contact Modra Capital →
  • ✓
    Fully funded in-houseModra can cover both the purchase and the full renovation with its own capital — everything under one roof.
  • ✓
    A network ready when it's neededTrusted investors and licensed partners stand ready for expansion or additional capital on larger projects.
  • ✓
    Conservative underwritingEvery deal is stress-tested before we commit a dollar.
  • ✓
    Capital with a conscience1% of revenue is pledged back to the planet and local causes.

Informational only. Modra develops its own projects; any financing is arranged through licensed third parties.

In their words

What clients say.

Everyone leaves ahead.

We measure success by whether our clients, the homes we touch, our partners, and our West Michigan neighborhoods all come out ahead — not just one of them. Honest work, homes we'd live in ourselves, service that respects people, and nothing hidden. That's the whole point of Modra.

About Modra Group

The people, the mission, the impact.

A small, accountable team in West Michigan building real estate the right way — so the homes, the neighborhoods, and the people we work with all come out ahead.

Modra Group was founded by a group of partners who shared one vision: to do real estate the right way, and to keep every part of it under one roof. Between us we fund the deal, rebuild the home, and care for it through the sale — so the property, the neighborhood, and the people we work with all come out ahead.

We're here to do the right thing, for the right reasons, with the utmost integrity. That means keeping our communities and the environment in mind on every project — improving homes while leaving the lightest footprint we can, and building something worth giving back to the places we work. Each arm of Modra is led by someone who owns the outcome and stands behind it.

Modra Impact

Giving 1% back.

Modra pledges 1% of revenue to the planet, funds local charitable organizations, and puts our team's hours where our values are.

Organizations we support
